This asset pack was made by ArtManOil, and is part of their Bots and Bolts asset pack collection on itch.io. This asset pack can be used in any commercial or non commercial project, and you may modify the assets as you wish, but this asset pack can not be resold or redistributed. (Even if modified.) Credit is NOT nessecary, but would be appreciated. Credit: https://art-man-oil.itch.io/

Are you using those assets ? Well, thank you ! Please mind the section below. ! You need to : - Credit the authors mention our social account (Twitter) : Gif (@gif_not_jif) Noiracide (@Noiracide) Romi (@DessRomaric) ✔️ You can : - Use the assets for non-commercial AND commercial project. - Adapt and/or modify the assets to match your project. ❌ You can NOT : - Distribute or sell those assets directly (even modified). - Claim the asset yours. - Use the assets for a NFT/metaverse/IA project. Isometric Stone Soup by Screaming Brain Studios (CC0) This pack has been converted from the Dungeon Crawl Stone Soup (CC0) tileset collection. Original Source: https://opengameart.org/content/dungeon-crawl-32x32-tiles-supplemental Wall Tiles ========== There are *.tsx tile-sheets for Tiled Map Editor for every tileset, which lets you mix and match tiles as needed. All Block tile-sheets also contain flat "Top Face" tiles which can be used as overlays on top of walls. These are found right beneath

Screaming Brain Studios - Cubemap Splitter v1.0 This tool has been released under the Public Domain (CC0) license and is free to share and redistribute. Open - Load a Cubemap, Panorama, or 6 images to stitch Layout - Switch the current projection type (Auto Detect, Horizontal, Vertical) Output - Displays the output folder where files will be saved. '...' - Select an output folder. Export - The two export buttons in the upper right will change depending on the current loaded Cubemap or Panorama i
